name: tt
text:
AI Recruitment System
for smarter resume screening and explainable ranking
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | for smarter resume screening and explainable ranking

text: Semantic resume matching, candidate ranking, skill scoring, behavioral analysis, product fit, title relevance, and recruiter-friendly explanations in one end-to-end workflow.
textPreview: Semantic resume matching, candidate ranking, skill scoring, behavioral analysis, product fit, title relevance, and recruiter-friendly exp...

text: Shows why each candidate moved up or down.
textPreview: Shows why each candidate moved up or down.

text:
Open with the core value proposition: an end-to-end hiring intelligence system.
Emphasize semantic matching, modular scoring, explainability, and a recruiter-friendly dashboard.
Suggested visual: dark hero slide with three feature cards and compact technology chips.

name: s2
text: Recruiters need to screen large candidate pools quickly, fairly, and with enough context to trust the shortlist.
textPreview: Recruiters need to screen large candidate pools quickly, fairly, and with enough context to trust the shortlist.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

name: p1-body
text:
Resumes arrive in large volumes and have to be evaluated under time pressure.
Keyword matching misses transferable skills and contextual relevance.
Hiring teams need not only a rank order, but also a clear reason behind each recommendation.
textPreview: Resumes arrive in large volumes and have to be evaluated under time pressure. | Keyword matching misses transferable skills and contextua...

name: p2-body
text:
Meaning-aware matching between the job description and candidate profiles.
A multi-signal ranking engine that combines text, history, behavior, and role fit.
An explainable output that recruiters can review and act on immediately.
textPreview: Meaning-aware matching between the job description and candidate profiles. | A multi-signal ranking engine that combines text, history, b...

text: Goal: replace manual triage with a system that surfaces the strongest candidates faster, while preserving recruiter trust in every score.
textPreview: Goal: replace manual triage with a system that surfaces the strongest candidates faster, while preserving recruiter trust in every score.

text:
Walk the audience through the pain of manual screening: too many resumes, too little time, and too much noise.
Point out that the real issue is not only matching, but matching with context and trust.
Suggested visual: a funnel or pressure chart showing large input volume narrowing to a few trusted candidates.

name: s3
text: Traditional resume screening often optimizes for speed or recall, but rarely balances relevance, transparency, and scale.
textPreview: Traditional resume screening often optimizes for speed or recall, but rarely balances relevance, transparency, and scale.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

name: l1-body
text:
Hard-coded keyword logic is brittle and easy to game.
It misses synonyms, adjacent domains, and transferable experience.
textPreview: Hard-coded keyword logic is brittle and easy to game. | It misses synonyms, adjacent domains, and transferable experience.

name: l2-body
text:
A single score hides which signal actually mattered.
Recruiters cannot easily challenge or audit the result.
textPreview: A single score hides which signal actually mattered. | Recruiters cannot easily challenge or audit the result.

name: l3-body
text:
Human-only review does not scale across hundreds or thousands of profiles.
Consistency drops when reviewers are comparing candidates in parallel.
textPreview: Human-only review does not scale across hundreds or thousands of profiles. | Consistency drops when reviewers are comparing candidates in...

text: Takeaway: the legacy approach is either fast but shallow, or careful but slow. The hackathon system is designed to do both.
textPreview: Takeaway: the legacy approach is either fast but shallow, or careful but slow. The hackathon system is designed to do both.

text:
Explain that the objective is not to remove recruiters from the loop, but to give them a better triage layer.
Highlight three gaps: brittleness, opacity, and scale.
Suggested visual: a three-column comparison with warning styling and a bottom takeaway banner.

name: s4
text: A modular AI pipeline transforms candidate data into a ranked, explainable shortlist.
textPreview: A modular AI pipeline transforms candidate data into a ranked, explainable shortlist.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

text: Load candidates.jsonl and job_description.docx as structured inputs.
textPreview: Load candidates.jsonl and job_description.docx as structured inputs.

text: Run semantic matching and skill overlap to capture relevance.
textPreview: Run semantic matching and skill overlap to capture relevance.

text: Compute experience, behavioral, product fit, and title relevance.
textPreview: Compute experience, behavioral, product fit, and title relevance.

text: Blend all signals, generate explanations, and export submission.csv.
textPreview: Blend all signals, generate explanations, and export submission.csv.

text: The architecture is intentionally modular, so each score can be tested, tuned, and explained independently without rebuilding the full system.
textPreview: The architecture is intentionally modular, so each score can be tested, tuned, and explained independently without rebuilding the full sy...

text:
Frame the solution as a pipeline: inputs, scoring modules, ranking, and export.
Call out that modularity makes the system easier to improve during a hackathon and easier to maintain later.
Suggested visual: four connected blocks with short labels and a compact conclusion strip.

name: s5
text: The system is organized into clear layers from ingestion to ranking, explanation, and output.
textPreview: The system is organized into clear layers from ingestion to ranking, explanation, and output.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

name: a1-body
text:
Keep each module isolated so it can be tested independently.
Process candidate records in batches for better performance on large JSONL files.
Separate scoring from ranking so the final decision remains auditable.
textPreview: Keep each module isolated so it can be tested independently. | Process candidate records in batches for better performance on large JSONL...

text: Candidate object creation and text normalization
textPreview: Candidate object creation and text normalization

text: Semantic, skill, experience, behavior, product fit, and title scores
textPreview: Semantic, skill, experience, behavior, product fit, and title scores

text: Final ranking, reasoning, submission.csv, and dashboard views
textPreview: Final ranking, reasoning, submission.csv, and dashboard views

text:
Describe the architecture from top to bottom: inputs, parsing, scoring, and outputs.
Emphasize that the separation of concerns makes the system easy to extend with new signals.
Suggested visual: a vertical layered diagram with a clear arrow flow from input to CSV output.

name: s6
text: The execution path is optimized for large datasets: read once, score in batches, rank once.
textPreview: The execution path is optimized for large datasets: read once, score in batches, rank once.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

text: Read JSONL candidates and the job description document.
textPreview: Read JSONL candidates and the job description document.

text: Normalize candidate fields into a consistent object model.
textPreview: Normalize candidate fields into a consistent object model.

text: Run the semantic model and modular scorers over chunks.
textPreview: Run the semantic model and modular scorers over chunks.

text: Sort by final score and create recruiter-friendly reasoning.
textPreview: Sort by final score and create recruiter-friendly reasoning.

text: Write submission.csv with the final ranked list.
textPreview: Write submission.csv with the final ranked list.

name: wf-note-body
text:
Semantic similarity is computed in batches to keep runtime practical for large candidate pools.
All other scoring modules are lightweight and run in pure Python.
The final ranking pass is a single sort over the scored rows.
textPreview: Semantic similarity is computed in batches to keep runtime practical for large candidate pools. | All other scoring modules are lightweig...

text:
Explain the pipeline in the order it executes, from file load through CSV export.
Highlight the batching strategy as the key scale optimization.
Suggested visual: a horizontal workflow with a performance callout panel underneath.

name: s7
text: Each layer of the stack was chosen to balance speed, signal quality, and presentation value.
textPreview: Each layer of the stack was chosen to balance speed, signal quality, and presentation value.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

text: Primary application language and orchestration layer.
textPreview: Primary application language and orchestration layer.

text: Data handling, tabular output, and CSV export.
textPreview: Data handling, tabular output, and CSV export.

text: Numeric utilities and efficient score operations.
textPreview: Numeric utilities and efficient score operations.

text: Cosine similarity and supporting ML utilities.
textPreview: Cosine similarity and supporting ML utilities.

text:
Walk through the stack from application code to NLP and dashboarding.
Mention that the stack is intentionally familiar and production-friendly for a hackathon audience.
Suggested visual: a 2x3 grid of technology tiles with color-coded accents.

name: s8
text: The semantic engine compares meaning, not just shared words.
textPreview: The semantic engine compares meaning, not just shared words.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

name: sem-left-body
text:
The job description and each candidate profile are converted into dense embeddings.
Batch encoding keeps the system fast even for large candidate pools.
Cosine similarity measures how closely the candidate story aligns with the role.
The engine can fall back to a lightweight similarity path if a model is unavailable.
textPreview: The job description and each candidate profile are converted into dense embeddings. | Batch encoding keeps the system fast even for large...

text: Candidate chunks are scored together to keep the pipeline practical at scale.
textPreview: Candidate chunks are scored together to keep the pipeline practical at scale.

text:
Explain that semantic matching is the first major quality filter because it captures meaning rather than just exact tokens.
Mention the batch encoding approach and the fallback path as production reliability choices.
Suggested visual: two inputs flowing into an embedding model and a similarity score gauge.

name: s9
text: The final score is a weighted blend of multiple signals, making the shortlist more balanced and defensible.
textPreview: The final score is a weighted blend of multiple signals, making the shortlist more balanced and defensible.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

name: rank-left-body
text:
Semantic score measures the resume-to-job description fit.
Skill, experience, behavior, product fit, and title relevance add recruiter context.
The weighted final score determines the deterministic rank order.
Explainability sits beside the score, so every rank can be justified in plain language.
textPreview: Semantic score measures the resume-to-job description fit. | Skill, experience, behavior, product fit, and title relevance add recruiter ...

text: 0.25 semantic + 0.25 skill + 0.10 experience + 0.10 behavior + 0.10 product fit + 0.20 title relevance
textPreview: 0.25 semantic + 0.25 skill + 0.10 experience + 0.10 behavior + 0.10 product fit + 0.20 title relevance

text:
Explain the weighted blend and why it is better than a single opaque score.
Point out that the ranking is deterministic and stable, which is important for trust and repeatability.
Suggested visual: a formula card with labeled score chips and a callout that the final rank is easy to audit.

name: s10
text: The dashboard makes the model useful for recruiters by turning scores into an interactive workflow.
textPreview: The dashboard makes the model useful for recruiters by turning scores into an interactive workflow.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

text: Explainability snapshot: why selected, what matched, and where the gaps are.
textPreview: Explainability snapshot: why selected, what matched, and where the gaps are.

text:
Describe the dashboard as the human interface for the ranking engine.
Call out the filters, ranked list, and explainability panel as the three most important UX elements.
Suggested visual: a polished app mockup with sidebar filters, candidate rows, and a details panel.

name: s11
text: The system converts a noisy screening problem into a faster and more transparent workflow.
textPreview: The system converts a noisy screening problem into a faster and more transparent workflow.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

name: b0-body
text: Batch scoring and automated ranking reduce the time spent on first-pass resume review.
textPreview: Batch scoring and automated ranking reduce the time spent on first-pass resume review.

name: b1-body
text: Semantic understanding improves relevance compared with pure keyword screening.
textPreview: Semantic understanding improves relevance compared with pure keyword screening.

name: b2-body
text: Explainability makes each recommendation easy to review, challenge, and defend.
textPreview: Explainability makes each recommendation easy to review, challenge, and defend.

name: b3-body
text: submission.csv and dashboard views make the output immediately usable by other teams.
textPreview: submission.csv and dashboard views make the output immediately usable by other teams.

text: Overall benefit: a hiring workflow that is more scalable, more consistent, and easier to explain to stakeholders.
textPreview: Overall benefit: a hiring workflow that is more scalable, more consistent, and easier to explain to stakeholders.

text:
Keep the benefit story practical: speed, relevance, trust, and handoff.
Avoid making hard performance claims unless measured; focus on business impact and demo value.
Suggested visual: four benefit cards plus a short bottom-line conclusion strip.

name: s12
text: The core pipeline is ready for the hackathon, and it can grow into a stronger hiring intelligence platform.
textPreview: The core pipeline is ready for the hackathon, and it can grow into a stronger hiring intelligence platform.

text: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon
textPreview: AI Recruitment System | Data & AI Hackathon

text: Use accepted/rejected outcomes to tune the scoring weights over time.
textPreview: Use accepted/rejected outcomes to tune the scoring weights over time.

text: Adapt the same pipeline to different job families and job descriptions.
textPreview: Adapt the same pipeline to different job families and job descriptions.

text: Layer in interview and offer signals to anticipate downstream success.
textPreview: Layer in interview and offer signals to anticipate downstream success.

name: conclusion-body
text:
The system combines semantic matching, modular scoring, and explainability into one recruiter-friendly workflow.
It is built for hackathon delivery but designed with production thinking: batching, modularity, and clear outputs.
The result is a shortlist that is easier to trust, easier to present, and easier to iterate on.
textPreview: The system combines semantic matching, modular scoring, and explainability into one recruiter-friendly workflow. | It is built for hackat...

text: Thank you. This is an end-to-end recruitment assistant that turns candidate data into ranked, explainable decisions.
textPreview: Thank you. This is an end-to-end recruitment assistant that turns candidate data into ranked, explainable decisions.

text:
Close by summarizing the product value: better matching, better trust, and better workflow fit.
Mention the next natural step is a feedback loop from recruiters to continuously improve the model.
Suggested visual: a short roadmap on one side and a strong closing statement on the other.
